name: woodbury-ext-elevenlabs
description: Text-to-speech using ElevenLabs API. Generate voiceovers and narration as audio files.

woodbury.name: elevenlabs
woodbury.description: Generate speech audio from text using ElevenLabs voices. Produces MP3 files for voiceovers, narration, and dialogue.

ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.description: ElevenLabs API key. Get one at https://elevenlabs.io

AUDIO_OUTPUT_DIR.description: Default folder to save generated audio files. Defaults to working directory.

ELEVENLABS_DEFAULT_VOICE.description: Default voice ID to use. Run tts_voices to list available voices.

ELEVENLABS_DEFAULT_MODEL.description: Default model ID. Options: eleven_multilingual_v2 (quality), eleven_flash_v2_5 (fast). Default: eleven_multilingual_v2
